# Denis Zhurba

> Product leader — AI/ML & P&L at scale. Runs product end-to-end at an international e-commerce
> platform; previously built the AI communications engine at Avito, a 60M-MAU marketplace
> (GenAI Lead for marketing & communications); founded BOXR, an AI coaching company for boxing
> (acquired by a PE roll-up); product & strategy at VK; strategy consulting at EY-Parthenon.
> MBA, London Business School.

This site is the professional home of Denis Zhurba: writing on AI/ML in communications and growth,
work case studies, talks, and recognition.

## Writing (practitioner analyses)

Denis writes on the economics and architecture of AI/ML communications at scale. The core set —
an investment-case analysis of AI-driven comms platforms; a practitioner's map of what AI/ML is
capable of in CRM in 2026 (incrementality on a global control group, platform shapes, build
order); a deep-dive on the marketplace messenger's AI/ML (intent, suggested replies, the
agreement signal, trust & safety); and a generative-content pipeline piece (LLM-as-judge evals,
pairwise reward-model selection, reward-hacking) — is currently reserved for editors ahead of
exclusive placement; access on request via [contact](https://www.plsfix.co.uk/contact/). Index:
[writing](https://www.plsfix.co.uk/writing/).

Publicly readable now:
- [The Future of Buyer Engagement Platforms: Hyper-Personalization with AI](https://hackernoon.com/the-future-of-buyer-engagement-platforms-hyper-personalization-with-ai) (HackerNoon)
- [Why 85% of Health & Fitness Apps Never Reach $1k MRR](https://hackernoon.com/why-85percent-of-health-and-fitness-apps-never-reach-$1k-mtr-and-how-to-build-one-that-does) (HackerNoon)

## Work

- [AI-driven communications platform (Avito)](https://www.plsfix.co.uk/work/ai-communications-platform/): board-approved investment case; ML ranking, uplift models, LLM content with reward-model selection; billions of messages a month.
- [BOXR — AI coaching for boxing](https://www.plsfix.co.uk/work/boxr/): consumer app plus in-gym software, sold as a bundle; on-device computer vision; acquired.
- [VK smart speakers](https://www.plsfix.co.uk/work/vk-smart-speakers/): GTM for the Marusya AI assistant and Capsula smart-speaker line.
